name: io.github.orchestra-hq/orchestra-mcp
title: Orchestra
description: MCP server for the Orchestra API: create, run, and observe data pipelines, logs, and artifacts

environmentVariables.name: ORCHESTRA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Orchestra API key from your workspace settings (https://app.getorchestra.io/settings/workspace)

environmentVariables.name: ORCHESTRA_ENABLE_DELETE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to expose the delete_pipeline tool (disabled by default)

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token using your Orchestra API key, e.g. 'Bearer <ORCHESTRA_API_KEY>'
